---
title: "Facilities"
subtitle: "An overview of available facilities"
page-layout: full
listing: 
- id: projects
  sort: "started desc"
  type: table
  fields: [image, title, author, subtitle, description]
  grid-item-align: left
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: 30px
  field-display-names: 
      title: "Title"
      author: "Contact"
      subtitle: "Modality"
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents: 
#    - projects/ 
    - facilities.yml 
---


:::{#facilities}
:::


<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
